plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Ghost Verifier to access your camera to record business verification videos.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Ghost Verifier to access your microphone for video recording.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Ghost Verifier to access your location to verify the business address.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Ghost Verifier to access your location to verify the business address.

infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Motion data is used to detect device tampering during verification.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is required to record business verification videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone is required for video recording.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is required to verify the business address.
